microsoft_ft: Scaled Azure's AI agent program from a **2-person operation** into a platformized system, standardizing workflows to sustain 45+ annual resilience drills and drive **$14M+ customer impact** across enterprise accounts including Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp.

Led **0→1 product development** of an internal Resilience Automation Platform — defining requirements, scoping self-service scheduling features, and partnering with engineering to cut operational toil by 30% and transition to a scalable, self-service model.

Built an **internal AI agent** and restructured planning workflows using prompt engineering and LLM-powered automation, reducing planning cycle time by 39% and expanding drill capacity by 21% without adding headcount.

Directed 14 cross-org recovery executions under executive visibility, including serving as bridge lead for a **sovereign-cloud network isolation test** tied to a $1.5B+ enterprise contract, translating complex technical requirements into clear product scope.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive resilience testing capability — delivered a rack-level drill program in **4 months** with a 94% recovery rate, surfacing critical hardware defects and establishing a repeatable validation model.
microsoft_2023: Drove **AI agent adoption** across 14 Azure service teams by leading hands-on demos and training sessions tied to code-generation workflows, saving 37 engineering hours monthly and accelerating activation of a new LLM-powered capability.

Shaped the product roadmap by conducting **11+ customer interviews** with finance and engineering stakeholders to surface critical feature gaps, directly influencing the addition of intent-based YAML generation to the sprint backlog.

Improved data integrity and **cut query lookup time by 83%** by enforcing metadata standards and migrating documentation to an AI-powered semantic search tool, enabling faster, more accurate outputs for downstream analytical workflows.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and cut region launch time by 28% by securing cross-functional alignment on a unified automation prioritization framework spanning 140+ engineering and finance operations teams.

Ran discovery with 20+ service teams to map **81 hours of manual toil per region launch**, then built a product roadmap to automate critical paths — directly informing executive prioritization and expansion strategy.

Engineered a **Power BI dashboard** to track operational toil and automation coverage across 140+ teams, giving leadership the customer health and usage-pattern visibility needed to target high-impact investments.
amazon_robotics: Defined the legacy OS migration strategy and mapped data dependencies across **1,200+ stations**, achieving zero operational downtime during a 2,000+ unit pilot and ensuring seamless system integration across the full fleet.

Facilitated Agile sprint planning and retrospectives, prioritizing the backlog to resolve **40+ high-priority integration issues** and stabilize the developer intake process across IT, Operations, and Engineering.

Partnered with cross-functional teams to implement **automated CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating the software deployment cycle by 25% and establishing a repeatable release model for future fleet-wide rollouts.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by redesigning end-to-end CRM workflows, managing scoping and invoicing for 200+ monthly proposals and building an onboarding process that reduced sales cycle friction significantly.

Cut **Customer Acquisition Cost by 13%** and lifted conversions by 2.7% by executing a data-driven GTM strategy — optimizing the website, Google profile, and digital funnel using analytics from the existing CRM data.

Identified and closed margin leaks by conducting **financial profitability analysis** across 1,000+ project records, delivering pricing model recommendations that directly improved leadership's expansion and account health decisions.
